name: Shinobu | Idol In Trouble
description:
She is being stalked and really needs your help


Shinobu is the leader of a popular idol group, "Great Days". But there is something that the public doesn't know: someone is stalking her. Threats, creepy photos, and someone even broke into her apartment once. She can't live like that anymore, not after the anxiety, paranoia, and stress took their toll at the last live concert, not when her fans worry about her. Her friend said that you might help her, so she has her first meeting with you today.

(Your role isn't really specified, you can be a detective, a bodyguard, or even the stalker in disguise.)



Music to listen to with this bot: The Voice Someone Calls

Artist: @S_ABOTEN__

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Additional Images:

Full Image

With a stray cat

Meme

Yup, second bot of Great Days idol girls. Kept you waiting, huh? A week since the last bot... Was busy irl and blah blah blah. Yea, still no big CSS update, maybe will work on it later or something. Soon there must be a collab with one dude, but we both are kinda lazy. Anyway, I hope you will like the bot, leave a comment and follow for more! Enjoy!

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it. Please, in comments write if you like or dislike the bot, would help a lot.
creator: kokitadain
